response: People with braces are dental appliances designed to correct misaligned teeth and improve oral health. They have no connection to the physical forces that govern gravity. Gravity is a fundamental force of nature that affects all objects with mass, regardless of whether someone wears braces or not. The ability to manipulate gravity at will is not a capability associated with braces or any other dental device. This idea is rooted in a misunderstanding of both physics and the function of orthodontic appliances. The weakness lies in the confusion between dental treatment and physical phenomena. weakness.
